stemHtml: Controller: "HOTAIR AG, RESET SQUAWK CHARLIE 3363". What should you do?

options.a: Verify 3363 is displayed with altitude, and reply "SQUAWK VERIFIED, HOTAIR AG".
options.c: Reselect 3363, confirm altitude reporting is on, and read back "RESETTING 3363, HOTAIR AG".
options.d: Verify display, press IDENT, and reply "SQUAWKING 3363, HOTAIR AG".
